description: Canonical parameter dictionary for low-dropout linear regulators (LDOs). Validated against a 39-datasheet, 20-manufacturer, 916-page corpus (see spec/v1.0/parameter-frequency-analysis.txt) and cross-checked with manufacturer parameter glossaries. Aliases normalize cross-vendor naming. Version 1.1 adds the rated output current and the operating and storage temperature ranges. Version 1.2 removes the unusable has_active_discharge capability flag (a boolean has no base-SI unit and so could never appear in a measurement); the capability is signalled by the presence of active_discharge_resistance.

parameters.name: Output voltage
parameters.hint: Fixed nominal output as absolute volts with min/typ/max. Percentages break down at low Vout, so store absolute and derive tolerance.

parameters.name: Output voltage accuracy
parameters.hint: Tolerance as a percentage. Vendors also express this as absolute millivolts for Vout below 2 V. Capture that case under output_voltage instead.

parameters.name: Reference / feedback voltage
parameters.hint: The error-amplifier reference. It is the specified datum for adjustable parts, and output_voltage_range is derived from it.

parameters.name: Adjustable output range
parameters.hint: Settable Vout min..max for adjustable parts.

parameters.name: Input voltage operating range
parameters.hint: First-class operating VIN range (distinct from the abs-max VIN). Store as recommended limitClass.

parameters.name: Output voltage temperature coefficient
parameters.hint: Average temperature coefficient. Present in about 20 of 39 datasheets in the corpus.

parameters.name: Line regulation
parameters.hint: Change in Vout for a stated change in Vin. Capture the Vin span as a condition.

parameters.name: Load regulation
parameters.hint: Change in Vout for a stated change in Iout. Capture the Iout span as a condition.

parameters.name: Thermal regulation
parameters.hint: %/W. Precision LDOs only.

parameters.name: Long-term output stability
parameters.hint: Drift over 1000h. Reference-grade parts only.

parameters.name: Dropout voltage
parameters.hint: Strongly load-dependent. Provide one measurement per load current, with the I_OUT condition on each. A single point is an array of length one.

parameters.name: Quiescent / ground current
parameters.hint: Typically specified at several loads. Watch nA/uA/mA normalization.

parameters.name: Shutdown current
parameters.hint: Supply current with EN low. Only for parts with an EN pin.

parameters.name: Rated output current
parameters.hint: The maximum continuous load current the part is specified to deliver, the headline current rating (for example a 1 A LDO). Distinct from current_limit, which is the fold-back knee.

parameters.name: Current limit
parameters.hint: Output current-limit knee.

parameters.name: Short-circuit current
parameters.hint: Foldback or short-circuit floor. Pair with current_limit, and record a foldback flag in notes if applicable.

parameters.name: Minimum load current
parameters.hint: Some bipolar or older LDOs require a minimum load to regulate. CMOS parts state 0.

parameters.name: Reverse current / leakage
parameters.hint: With input grounded and output forced. Common on automotive/battery parts.

parameters.name: ADJ / FB pin bias current
parameters.hint: Bias current into the adjust/feedback pin (adjustable parts).

parameters.name: UVLO threshold
parameters.hint: Under-voltage lockout on VIN.

parameters.name: Power-supply rejection ratio
parameters.hint: One measurement per frequency, F condition mandatory. "Ripple rejection" is the same quantity (20·log(ΔVin/ΔVout)).

parameters.name: Output noise (integrated RMS)
parameters.hint: Integrated RMS over a stated bandwidth. Capture BW_LOW and BW_HIGH as conditions, since the figure is meaningless without the band.

parameters.name: Enable pull-down resistance
parameters.hint: Internal EN pulldown. Distinct from en_input_current.

parameters.name: Power-good rising threshold
parameters.hint: % of Vout(nom), rising.

parameters.name: Power-good output low voltage
parameters.hint: VOL of the open-drain PG pin at a stated sink current.

parameters.name: Load transient response
parameters.hint: Output deviation for a load step. Model the step with the measurement stimulus field, giving I_OUT from, to, and slew.

parameters.name: Line transient response
parameters.hint: Output deviation for a line step. Model with the measurement stimulus field, giving V_IN from, to, and slew.

parameters.name: Recommended input capacitance
parameters.hint: Minimum recommended CIN.

parameters.name: Minimum output capacitance
parameters.hint: Capture C_OUT_TYPE, for example ceramic or tantalum, as a condition, since stability specifications depend on it.

parameters.name: Stable ESR range
parameters.hint: COUT ESR range for stability (min..max).

parameters.name: Maximum power dissipation
parameters.hint: Belongs in the absolute-maximum table with limitClass absolute_max. Present in about 32 of 39 datasheets in the corpus.

parameters.name: Thermal resistance, junction-to-ambient
parameters.hint: Store the numeric per-watt figure in degC. Capture the package and the board or airflow, for example JEDEC 2s2p, as conditions. Present in about 30 of 39 datasheets in the corpus.

parameters.name: ESD, human body model
parameters.hint: Per JEDEC JS-001. In abs-max or a dedicated ESD table.

parameters.name: ESD, charged device model
parameters.hint: Per JEDEC JS-002.

parameters.name: Operating temperature range
parameters.hint: The recommended operating temperature range, junction or ambient as specified. Store as recommended limitClass, with min and max in the value.

parameters.name: Storage temperature range
parameters.hint: The absolute-maximum storage temperature range. Store as absolute_max limitClass, with min and max in the value.
